seasonal.spring_tip: Cherry blossoms are blooming! Visit Japanese Tea Garden, explore botanical gardens, and enjoy family hikes. Don't miss Easter egg hunts and spring festivals.
seasonal.spring: Spring is here! Perfect time for outdoor playgrounds, botanical gardens, and picnics in the park.
seasonal.summer_tip: Water parks, beach trips, and outdoor camps are in full swing. Apply sunscreen, stay hydrated, and explore Bay Area's best summer activities!
seasonal.summer: Summer fun! Head to water parks, beaches, and outdoor festivals across the Bay Area.
seasonal.fall_tip: Pumpkin patches, apple picking, and harvest festivals! Perfect weather for family hikes and outdoor fun. Check out Half Moon Bay pumpkins!
seasonal.fall: Fall adventures await! Enjoy pumpkin patches, harvest festivals, and cozy museum visits.
seasonal.winter_tip: Indoor museums, ice skating, holiday light shows, and Tahoe snow play! Great time for indoor activities and cozy family outings.
seasonal.winter: Winter wonderland! Discover indoor play spaces, holiday events, and rainy-day museums.
